boundary_binding.action_boundary: May clinical operations activate the trial site?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Action cannot proceed. Source records lack exact match for consent-status class verification before enrollment, as required by STD-BOR-082-P.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: FEAS-BOR-082 limits AUTH-BOR-082 to planning only, pending abstract consent-status class verification before enrollment.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: ESCALATE verdict is source-plausible; gate fails on missing source-term citations (B-18, P8.1, C12, IRB-approved) requiring repair only.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: AUTH-BOR-082 is activation authority, but FEAS-BOR-082 limits its scope to planning only, pending abstract consent-status class verification.

final_answer: The action must escalate because the source records do not definitively prove abstract consent-status class verification before enrollment, a requirement of STD-BOR-082-P. While AUTH-BOR-082 is cited as activation authority, FEAS-BOR-082 restricts its scope to planning, pending this crucial verification. The boundary remains open due to these missing exact-match terms for site, protocol, and consent status.
open_blockers: STD-BOR-082-P exact-match policy binding confirms consent-status class requirement
C12 consent identifier and IRB-approved status
